items.title: Open source terminal coding agent
items.oneliner: Terminal-first coding agent with TUI, web search, and CI support that you can install and run today.

items.title: Linux binaries run on macOS
items.oneliner: Runs Arm64 and x86-64 Linux ELF binaries on Apple Silicon using lightweight VMs instead of Docker.

items.title: Meson gets real dependency management
items.oneliner: Adds lockfiles, version resolution, local caches, and shareable packages to Meson wraps without replacing Meson.

items.title: Kernel patch gap tracker
items.oneliner: Searchable database that flags likely unpropagated Linux kernel security patches before your distro ships them.

items.title: SQLite full scan detector
items.oneliner: Shows how to catch SQLite full table scans from prepared statement stats before slow queries hit production.

items.title: Build PlanetScale style branching yourself
items.oneliner: Hands-on walkthrough for cloning databases from snapshots and managing branch-like environments with a custom CLI.

items.title: Package binaries with Guix
items.oneliner: Practical Guix tutorial that turns a raw binary into a reproducible package with declared dependencies.

items.title: Build an APL interpreter
items.oneliner: Step-by-step Python tutorial for tokenizing and parsing APL, with code you can follow and extend.

items.title: Better command line design guide
items.oneliner: Open source CLI design handbook with concrete rules for help text, flags, output, errors, and scripting behavior.

items.title: Experimental Gecko browser for iOS
items.oneliner: Firefox-style iOS browser using Gecko, with install paths for sideloading and support for older iOS versions.
